title: Are we on the cusp of a new paradigm for biology? The illogic of molecular developmental biology versus Janus-faced control of embryogenesis via differentiation waves.
abstract: The logic of molecular developmental biology fails to explain embryogenesis. A new approach, Janus-faced control, involving both top-down control by differentiation waves and bottom-up control via the mechanical consequences of cell differentiations, may be needed. This obviates problems inherent in reductionism with an explicit, testable mechanism.
